creator: mfburdett@gmail.com
text:
Icecast 2.3.2 was released on 02 June 2008.

Fix: I removed patch-src::auth_url.c as it no longer applies, and as far as I can tell is no longer needed.

the patch on 2.3.1:
+#if LIBCURL_VERSION_NUM < 0x071000
     curl_easy_setopt (url_info->handle, CURLOPT_PASSWDFUNCTION, my_getpass);
+#endif

equivalent lines in 2.3.2:
#ifdef CURLOPT_PASSWDFUNCTION
    curl_easy_setopt (url_info->handle, CURLOPT_PASSWDFUNCTION, my_getpass);
#endif


Patch attached with submission follows:
